summary_en: 4,048,500 shares (4.56% of outstanding) to be acquired for up to ¥3.00B via single-session ToSTNeT-3 block trade on 21-May-2026 at ¥741/share (prior close). Execution window: 08:45 JST trading session only, single order window.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 20 May 2026, Daiho Corporation's board authorized the acquisition of treasury stock via a single block transaction. The company will place an order on the morning of 21 May 2026 (08:45 JST) to purchase up to 4,048,500 shares via the Tokyo Stock Exchange's ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading system at the prior day's closing price of ¥741 per share, for a total outlay of up to ¥3.00 billion (representing 4.56% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock). The transaction will be executed as a single time-limited order during that trading window only; results will be announced immediately after the session ends. The company notes that market conditions may result in partial or no execution. The rationale stated is to enable flexible capital management in response to changing business conditions.
